title: KeychainHelper shared Keychain access group migration
description: Update KeychainHelper.swift to include kSecAttrAccessGroup set to the shared group ($(AppIdentifierPrefix)net.renalias.AggregatorApp.shared) on all read, write, and delete queries. Add a one-time migration path: attempt to read the existing credential without an access group; if found, write it to the shared group and delete the old item. Preserve existing service/account key strings. After migration the widget process can read the CF credentials the app wrote.
acceptance_criteria: All KeychainHelper SecItem queries include kSecAttrAccessGroup pointing to the shared group
One-time migration runs once on first launch post-update and does not repeat
Existing KeychainHelper unit tests still pass
A widget-target test or scratch build can read a credential previously written by the app target
